title: Bifatife deepens Ifa Corpus In the drama of life, ancient wisdom
description: Scholars and historians alike, in one accord, have acknowledged ifa, as the greatest multi-cultural institution of the Yoruba.

title: Dimple Jangda at Cannes: Ancient Wisdom Meets the World Stage
description: New Delhi [India], May 23: Dimple Jangda -- National Bestselling Author, Celebrity Ayurvedic and Gut Health Coach, and Founder of Prana by Dimple Jangda -- attended the Cannes Film Festival in May 2026 as she ventured into the world of documentary filmmaking. Ms. Jangda brought with her a singular creative vision: to capture India's ancient philosophical and scientific traditions -- Ayurveda, Yoga, Vedic cosmology, and classical life sciences -- through the modern cinematic lens, for a global audience hungry for wisdom rooted in millennia of lived experience. Editors, producers, filmmakers, and creative collaborators were invited to connect with Ms. Jangda at Cannes to explore co-production, distribution, and storytelling partnerships for this landmark documentary project.
